DECLARATION OF ROBERT L. POLLAK IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FOR ORDER THAT THE GENUINENESS OF DOCUMENTS AND TRUTH OF FACTS BE ADMITTED AND COMPELLING RESPONSES TO INTERROGATORIES AND PRODUCTIONS OF DOCUMENTS AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS INCLUDING ATTORNEYS' FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF I.C. ISAACS &. CO., INC., A CORPORATION

DISCOVERY 610, HAROLD B. AUERBACH APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: NO OPPOSITION HAVING BEEN FILED, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM AND SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE COMPLETE RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTION WITHIN 14 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO DEEM ADMITTED THE MATTERS SET FORTH IN THE REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS IS GRANTED. FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $586.30, TO BE PAID WITHIN 14 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMM: BRUCE E. CHAN

DISCOVERY 610, NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR TERMINATING AND MONETARY SANCTIONS IS GRANTED IN PART. DEFENDANT DISOBEYED THE PRIOR ORDER BY FAILING TO SERVE TIMELY RESPONSES AND TO PAY THE MONETARY SANCTIONS. THE COURT ORDERS THAT ADDITIONAL MONETARY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $586.30 SHALL BE PAID WITHIN 14 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMM: BRUCE E. CHAN
